Trip Planner

Khor Fakkan to Sharjah Bus Timings

January 12, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Traveling from Khor Fakkan to Sharjah doesn’t have to be expensive or complicated. With reliable public bus services available in the UAE, passengers can enjoy a comfortable and budget-friendly journey between the two cities. By understanding the routes and schedules in advance, travelers can avoid unnecessary delays and reach their destination smoothly.

This guide provides essential details about bus services, approximate travel times, fares, and important stations, along with practical tips to help you plan your trip more efficiently.

The Most Affordable Way to Travel

Estimated Travel Time:
46 minutes

Ticket Price:
AED 15.00

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Departure Time:
07:34
Arrival Time:
08:20

Public Transport Options

Travelers may need to combine several modes of transport depending on their starting point:

  1. RTA Bus 53: Departs from: Etisalat Head Office
  2. Metro Red Line: Departs from: Union Metro Station
  3. RTA Bus E307: Departs from: Deira City Center Bus Station

Travel Tips for the Khor Fakkan–Sharjah Route

  • Plan Ahead: Bus services such as Bus 116 operate on fixed schedules. Checking departure times in advance using official transport websites or mobile apps can significantly reduce waiting time.
  • Avoid Rush Hours: Morning and late afternoon periods are usually the busiest. If possible, travel outside peak hours to enjoy a more comfortable ride.
  • Familiarize Yourself with Stops: Knowing the main stops along the route helps prevent confusion. The journey typically starts at Al Zubara Bus Station (Khor Fakkan) and ends at Al Jubail Bus Station (Sharjah), passing through several key locations along the way.
  • Prepare Your Payment: Carry a prepaid Nol card and some cash as backup. Payment methods can vary, so it’s best to confirm accepted options beforehand to avoid inconvenience.
  • Comfort and Safety: Buses are air-conditioned and designed for passenger comfort, but they can become crowded during busy times. Boarding early increases your chances of finding a seat and enjoying a safer, more relaxed journey.

Read More: Kalba to Sharjah 611 Bus Timings

Conclusion

Bus 116 offers an economical and dependable way to travel between Khor Fakkan and Sharjah. With regular daily services and multiple stops, it provides flexibility for both residents and visitors. By planning ahead and following the tips outlined above, passengers can enjoy a smooth and stress-free trip. Overall, the UAE’s public transport network continues to be a practical and affordable option for intercity travel.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: January 12, 2026.
